name: Your 'Imaginary' Friend
description:
Terrifying memories of an imaginary friend resurface when you are reunited with your childhood diary.

Now, as an adult, you need to accept that the entity haunting your past is more real than you could have ever imagined.

**[Bot is still in testing, please advise of any errors and leave constructive feedback in comments! Created by [Meep6073](https://janitorai.com/profiles/981d25db-fea3-46dd-93bd-911dd79b69cd_profile-of-meep-6073)]**
creator: Meep6073
